data.markdown:
Featured

Jonathan Chan quit a high-paying job and grew two businesses to a combined total of $30k/mo within eight months. Here's how.

Featured

Adithyan Ilangovan quit his job, failed at his first product, then built an AI-augmented agency. Now, it's bringing in $14.5k/mo. Here's how.

Featured

Geoff Roberts built a tool solve tool sprawl, then challenged some of the best companies in the world. Nine years later, he's at 7 figures. Here's how.

Featured

After two failed products, Dustin Stout saw an opportunity and started building with no-code tools. Now, his product is bringing in ~$100k MRR. Here's how.

A daily leaderboard of build-in-public posts.

data.summary: Latest featured posts and interviews from Indie Hackers, detailing entrepreneurs' journeys, successes, and key insights.

items.title: Jonathan Chan quit a high-paying job and grew two businesses to a combined total of $30k/mo within eight months.
items.details: Jonathan Chan successfully grew two businesses to $30k/month within eight months after quitting a high-paying job.

items.title: Adithyan Ilangovan quit his job, failed at his first product, then built an AI-augmented agency. Now, it's bringing in $14.5k/mo.
items.details: Adithyan Ilangovan overcame an initial product failure to build an AI-augmented agency now generating $14.5k/month.

items.title: Geoff Roberts built a tool solve tool sprawl, then challenged some of the best companies in the world. Nine years later, he's at 7 figures.
items.details: Geoff Roberts developed a tool to address 'tool sprawl' and achieved 7-figure revenue after nine years.

items.title: After two failed products, Dustin Stout saw an opportunity and started building with no-code tools. Now, his product is bringing in ~$100k MRR.
items.details: Dustin Stout achieved approximately $100k MRR with a no-code product after two previous failures.
